TestCase.name: testPattern1
TestCase.Resource: LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[AVG($0)], EXPR$0=[AVG($1)], EXPR$0=[COUNT($2)], EXPR$0=[COUNT($3)], EXPR$0=[MAX($4)], EXPR$0=[MIN($5)]) LogicalProject($f3=[CASE(SEARCH($2, Sarg[[1..20]]), $3, null:INTEGER)], $f4=[CASE(SEARCH($2, Sarg[[21..40]]), $3, null:INTEGER)], $f5=[CASE(SEARCH($2, Sarg[[1..20]]), 0, null:INTEGER)], $f6=[CASE(SEARCH($2, Sarg[[21..40]]), 0, null:INTEGER)], $f7=[CASE(SEARCH($2, Sarg[[21..40]]), $3, null:INTEGER)], $f8=[CASE(SEARCH($2, Sarg[[1..20]]), $3, null:INTEGER)]) LogicalFilter(condition=[SEARCH($2, Sarg[[1..20], [21..40]])]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[AVG($0)], EXPR$0=[COUNT()], EXPR$0=[MAX($0)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$3]) LogicalFilter(condition=[SEARCH($2, Sarg[[21..40]])]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[AVG($0)], EXPR$0=[COUNT()], EXPR$0=[MIN($0)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$3]) LogicalFilter(condition=[SEARCH($2, Sarg[[1..20]])]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[EMP]])
